JUDICAËL de Nantes, illegitimate son of HOËL Comte de Nantes & his mistress --- ([978/80]-1005).  The …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes於0970年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可南斯時，他的父親Hoel de Nantes, Comte de Nantes40歲，母親Duchess Judith de Nantes36歲。他和Melisende du Maine至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1037年6月13日在法國布列塔尼享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes was born in 0970, in Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Hoel de Nantes, Comte de Nantes, was 40 and his mother, Duchess Judith de Nantes, was 36. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Melisende du Maine. He died on 13 June 1037, in Brittany, France, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes est né en 0970, à Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Hoel de Nantes, Comte de Nantes, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Duchess Judith de Nantes, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Melisende du Maine. Il est décédé le 13 juin 1037, à Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes 0970 in Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hoel de Nantes, Comte de Nantes 40 und seine Mutter Duchess Judith de Nantes 36. Er hatte mit Melisende du Maine mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Juni 1037 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes è nato il nel 0970 nel Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Hoel de Nantes, Comte de Nantes, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Duchess Judith de Nantes, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Melisende du Maine. Morì il 13 giugno 1037, nel Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 67 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes(이)가 0970년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 난츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hoel de Nantes, Comte de Nantes(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Duchess Judith de Nantes(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Melisende du Maine(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1037년 6월 13일 프랑스 브레타그니에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes nasceu em 0970, em Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Hoel de Nantes, Comte de Nantes, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Duchess Judith de Nantes, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Melisende du Maine. Ele faleceu em 13 de junho de 1037, em Bretagne, França, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes родился в 0970 г. в местности нантесь, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Hoel de Nantes, Comte de Nantes было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Duchess Judith de Nantes, 36. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Melisende du Maine. Он умер 13 июня 1037 г. в местности бретагн, Франция в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Judicäel III de Bretagne, Bishop of Vannes nació en 0970, en Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Hoel de Nantes, Comte de Nantes, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Duchess Judith de Nantes, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Melisende du Maine. Murió el 13 de junio de 1037, en Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 67 años.
